status.prompt: Create a 12-second video. Realistic cinematic short film with warm naturalism and soft natural lighting. Sara, a young woman in her late twenties wearing a navy blazer and jeans, stands on a small wooden stage in front of an audience of about thirty people in a bright modern auditorium. Beat 1 (0-5s): Sara walks to her mark, takes a slow breath, looks at one person in the front-left section, holds eye contact for two full seconds with a soft smile. Beat 2 (5-10s): Her gaze moves smoothly to a person in the center-back, holds for two seconds, eyes warm. Beat 3 (10-15s): Gaze sweeps to the front-right, holds, then she says 'Good morning everyone' in a calm warm English voice. Subtle ambient room tone, no music. Wide shot from side angle showing both Sara and the audience faces. Slow camera push-in over the 15 seconds. Keep the story complete within the requested duration. Avoid text overlays, subtitles, logos, watermarks, abrupt cuts, and visible glitches.
